# Neil Dave — AI Solution Architect

> Neil Dave is an AI Solution Architect and Generative AI Engineer based in Bangalore, India, with 7+ years of expertise in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, LLM Engineering, Computer Vision, and MLOps. He works at Mumbai Indians (IPL franchise), mentors 120+ professionals on LinkedIn, and consults for SMBs and enterprises globally on AI strategy and implementation.
>
> Wikidata entity: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q138716797
> Contact: hello@theneildave.in

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://theneildave.in/): Portfolio, skills, projects, publications, newsletter, and contact. Covers AI consulting services and professional background.
- [Enterprise AI Consulting](https://theneildave.in/enterprise.html): AI consulting services for CTOs and engineering leaders — Generative AI strategy, LLM integration, MLOps, and Responsible AI audits.
- [Collaborate](https://theneildave.in/collaborate.html): AI tool collaboration page for founders and builders — three engagement models: build, advise, and co-create.
- [Speaking](https://theneildave.in/speaking.html): Speaker kit for conference organisers. Topics include Generative AI, LLMOps, Responsible AI, and AI strategy.
- [Blog](https://theneildave.in/blog.html): Articles on AI engineering, LLM deployment, MLOps, and the AI industry.
- [Lead Magnet](https://theneildave.in/lead.html): Free AI-optimised resume template.

## Blog Posts

- [Responsible AI in Practice](https://theneildave.in/blog/responsible-ai-in-practice.html): Frameworks and real-world patterns for deploying AI ethically and safely.
- [Agentic AI System Design](https://theneildave.in/blog/agentic-ai-system-design.html): Architecture patterns for building reliable multi-agent AI systems.
- [LLMOps vs MLOps](https://theneildave.in/blog/llmops-vs-mlops.html): Compares operational practices for large language models versus traditional ML pipelines.
- [GEO Audit — Portfolio Site](https://theneildave.in/blog/geo-audit-portfolio-site.html): Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO) audit of a personal portfolio site.
- [Scaling Generative AI from Pilot to Production](https://theneildave.in/blog/scaling-generative-ai-pilot-to-production.html): Practical guide to moving Gen AI proofs-of-concept into production systems.
- [Data Scientist vs AI Engineer (2026)](https://theneildave.in/blog/data-scientist-vs-ai-engineer-2026.html): Role comparison covering skills, salaries, and career paths in 2026.
- [Enterprise LLM Cost Breakdown (2026)](https://theneildave.in/blog/enterprise-llm-cost-2026.html): Full cost analysis of running LLMs at enterprise scale.
- [Using Claude Code Without a Paid Plan](https://theneildave.in/blog/claude-code-without-paid-plan.html): Guide to accessing Claude Code on the free tier.

## Portfolio Projects

- [Generative AI Projects](https://theneildave.in/gen-ai.html): RAG pipelines, LLM fine-tuning, and Gen AI applications.
- [Sepsis Prediction](https://theneildave.in/sepsis.html): ML model for early ICU sepsis detection (healthcare AI).
- [Computer Vision — CV](https://theneildave.in/cv.html): Computer vision system for player tracking and performance analytics.
- [CV Object Detection](https://theneildave.in/cv-object-detection.html): Real-time object detection pipeline using deep learning.
- [Run Prediction](https://theneildave.in/run-prediction.html): Cricket run-rate prediction model (sports analytics, Mumbai Indians).
- [Responsible AI](https://theneildave.in/rai.html): Responsible AI audit framework and bias mitigation case study.
